case_title: CAROLIN HAUSER VS. DESTINEE BERMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANTS DESTINEE BERMAN, DESTINEE BERMAN LLC, AND AMERICAN EXPRESS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) IS GRANTED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HAUSER, CAROLIN AS TO DEFENDANT BERMAN, DESTINEE AKA HEAP BERMAN DESTINEE BERMAN LLC, AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY (REG. AGENT CT CORPORATION) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DESTINEE BERMAN LLC,

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-08-2016 AT 1:30 PM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUSER, CAROLIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BERMAN, DESTINEE AKA HEAP BERMAN DESTINEE BERMAN LLC, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, AMERICAN EXPRESS COMPANY, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
